mapper.select: SELECT * FROM community_guideline ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM community_guideline WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO community_guideline (version_label, summary, lede, oks_json, nos_json, rules_json, params_json, status, enforce_type, scheduled_at, admin_id, published_at) VALUES (#{versionLabel}, #{summary}, #{lede}, #{oksJson}, #{nosJson}, #{rulesJson}, #{paramsJson}, #{status}, #{enforceType}, #{scheduledAt}, #{adminId},
NOW() NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_guideline SET version_label = #{versionLabel}, summary = #{summary}, lede = #{lede}, oks_json = #{oksJson}, nos_json = #{nosJson}, rules_json = #{rulesJson}, params_json = #{paramsJson}, status = #{status}, enforce_type = #{enforceType}, scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt} , published_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
